sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move left green RIGHT to overlap right side of left charcoal
# Left green at cols 9-11, left charcoal at cols 11-15
# Move RIGHT to cols 12-14, which overlaps charcoal at cols 12-14

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 31, 'col': 10}])
action([{'action': 'RIGHT'}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"Bar W={lines[63].count('W')}")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['pixels'] == 1:
        print(f"Center: color={n['color']}, at {n['boundary'][0]}")

for r in range(28, 38):
    print(f"Row {r}: {lines[r][8:20]}")

done = last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)
print(f"Level completed: {done}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
